description:
Create a solar carport structure in SketchUp Make 2017 consisting of an elevated rectangular canopy (12 meters long × 5 meters wide) raised 3 meters above the ground plane on support columns. Then, install solar panels on the canopy's top surface using the Skelion plugin. Save the completed model to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\solar_carport.skp'.

Requirements:
1. Draw the canopy surface elevated 3m above the ground plane.
2. Create at least 4 vertical support columns connecting the canopy to the ground.
3. Use the Skelion plugin to cover the top surface of the canopy with solar panels.
4. Save the file exactly to the requested path.
